trackingPolicy.sourceOfTruth: Manual milestone records are authoritative. Evidence scans are supporting context only.
trackingPolicy.completionModel: Milestone checklist with no weighted percentage in v1.
trackingPolicy.completedAtPolicy: Use exact dates only when known. For inferred or undated completions, keep completedAt null and cite the source.
trackingPolicy.credentialPolicy: Do not store credentials, API keys, passwords, or password-document contents in this tracker.

projects.name: Triathlete Pro
projects.role: Triathlon adaptation of the Olbrecht-style energy tracking workflow with React, local Node API, SQLite persistence, and shared calculation logic.

sourceDocs.title: README.md
sourceDocs.usedFor: Purpose, stack, run commands, verification command, model status

sourceDocs.title: MODEL_AUDIT.md
sourceDocs.usedFor: Implemented model corrections and remaining provisional formula work

milestones.title: Shared calculation module wired into backend recomputation and persistence
milestones.evidence: One shared calculation module lives in src/shared/model.ts; backend session creation and recomputation call it and persist calculation traces.
milestones.nextAction: Confirm by running npm run verify and recording the evidence snapshot.
milestones.notes: Completion is source-explicit but undated.

milestones.title: Calculation outputs include confidence levels, warnings, coefficient versions, and traces
milestones.evidence: README states outputs include coefficient version, confidence level, warnings, and calculation trace.
milestones.nextAction: Spot-check persisted session output during first project-specific audit.
milestones.notes: Completion is source-explicit but undated.

milestones.title: Model and database validation coverage exists for current provisional model
milestones.evidence: Audit lists pace conversion, load determinism, carryover direction, confidence separation, calibration regression, migrations, seeded accounts, access boundaries, persistence, coefficient precedence, and recomputation.
milestones.nextAction: Run npm run verify and confirm all listed checks are represented in the current test suite.
milestones.notes: The source lists coverage, but this tracker has not yet verified the tests.

milestones.title: Complete literature review and production calibration for formulas
milestones.evidence: Formula areas needing review include cost of transport, ACSM equations, critical power/W prime, lactate recovery fitting, HRV readiness, and Olbrecht/Mader concepts.
milestones.nextAction: Define required source list and acceptance criteria for moving from estimated-default to production coaching use.

milestones.title: Review and activate athlete-specific profile values and coefficients
milestones.evidence: Defaults remain estimated until athlete-specific profile values and calibration-derived coefficients are reviewed and activated.
milestones.nextAction: Define calibration workflow and criteria for partially-calibrated and fully-calibrated outputs.

milestones.title: Record first baseline verification result
milestones.evidence: The project defines npm run verify as the full gate.
milestones.nextAction: Run npm run verify and store result in check-in history.

milestones.title: Adopt shared contracts and map domain ReadinessSnapshot/LoadMetric types to ecosystem envelopes
milestones.evidence: Contracts vendored to src/ecosystem-contracts (registered in check-vendored.mjs); src/shared/ecosystemEnvelope.ts maps ReadinessSnapshot -> ReadinessSnapshotUpsert with documented discipline->category banding (ready/caution/overload -> green/yellow/red mirrored per system; native per-discipline detail + coefficient version in extensions; confidence-level mapping). 6 adapter tests.

milestones.title: Publish triathlon readiness and load envelopes to AthleteOS
milestones.evidence: server/ecosystemSync.ts: SQLite outbox (snapshot id = idempotency key), canonical athlete link resolution, batch push to POST /api/sync/push, interval + post-calculate drains — all SERVER-SIDE so the service key never reaches the browser (S2 by construction). Wired into POST /readiness/calculate. Full verify gate green (audit + typecheck + lint + 17/17 + build). F1 logged: move hook into calculateAndStoreReadiness for lazy-compute coverage.
milestones.nextAction: F1: publish from calculateAndStoreReadiness itself so GET /readiness lazy computes also publish.

milestones.title: Emit TriathleteTracker required events to SentiOS
milestones.evidence: EcosystemSync.emitSenti (module TriathleteTracker): readiness_updated + session_imported at routes, athlete_os_export_success/fail on drain, triathlete_tracker_heartbeat 45s. Fail-silent; disabled without SENTIOS_API_KEY.

projects.name: OlyState Pro
projects.role: Coach-facing Olympic weightlifting readiness dashboard with a manual-first model and normalized observations for future sensor support.

sourceDocs.title: README.md
sourceDocs.usedFor: Purpose, model notes, run commands, verification commands

sourceDocs.title: docs/olystate-framework.md
sourceDocs.usedFor: Detailed calculation framework, pending follow-up inspection

milestones.title: Manual-first Olympic weightlifting readiness dashboard
milestones.evidence: README describes a coach-facing readiness dashboard and manual-first first version.
milestones.nextAction: Run the app or e2e flow and confirm the dashboard workflow is available.
milestones.notes: The README describes intended/current behavior, but this tracker has not verified it.

milestones.title: Four-system state model for neural, muscular, connective, and autonomic readiness
milestones.evidence: README defines hidden systemState from -6 to +4 and the four tracked systems.
milestones.nextAction: Inspect docs/olystate-framework.md and tests to confirm the model implementation.

milestones.title: Separate technical readiness and attempt confidence from physiological readiness
milestones.evidence: README states technical readiness and attempt confidence are separate from physiological readiness.
milestones.nextAction: Confirm the UI and engine preserve this separation.

milestones.title: Pain-region guardrails constrain recommendations without diagnosing injury
milestones.evidence: README states pain-region guardrails constrain recommendations.
milestones.nextAction: Inspect framework docs and tests for guardrail behavior.

milestones.title: Record first baseline test, build, and e2e results
milestones.evidence: Project defines npm test, npm run build, and npm run test:e2e.
milestones.nextAction: Run all three verification commands and store the results.

milestones.title: Add future observation sources without replacing the calculation engine
milestones.evidence: README names future sources: bar velocity, force plates, video, IMUs, HR straps, wearables, scales, and recovery devices.
milestones.nextAction: Define first sensor integration only after the manual-first workflow is validated.
milestones.notes: Deferred by product sequencing, not blocked.

milestones.title: Add exportable persistence beyond localStorage as the integration precondition
milestones.evidence: Local API (node:http + node:sqlite, Triathlete pattern per APPROACH_SUGGESTIONS S3): GET/PUT /dataset with bounded snapshot history at server/; app dual-mode persistence (hydrates from API when VITE_OLYSTATE_API_URL set, localStorage always-on fallback — standalone rule intact). verify script added; typecheck:server + 16/16 tests + build green. F3 logged: revision counter before multi-device use.

milestones.title: Map normalized observations to ecosystem envelopes, including FormLab video observations
milestones.evidence: src/domain/ecosystemEnvelope.ts: Observation -> ObservationUpsert near-1:1 (sport=lift, metric-keyed values, confidence clamp, video_formlab source preserved); athlete resolved via session linkage; observation id = idempotency key so dataset re-saves never duplicate. Server enqueues on PUT /dataset and drains to the hub. 6 new domain tests. F2 logged: direct athleteId for session-less observations. FormLab-observation INGESTION (video_formlab inbound) remains future work.
milestones.nextAction: Inbound path: pull FormLab biomech observations for lifters once FormLab lift analyses exist.

milestones.title: Emit OlyState required events to SentiOS
milestones.evidence: Server emits module OlyState signals: olystate_heartbeat 45s, session_imported on dataset save, athlete_os_push_success/fail on drain. Fail-silent, env-gated.

milestones.title: Local monitoring layer reports signal presence, routing completeness, latency, integrity, orphaning, required-event coverage, and history

milestones.title: Electron desktop shell, Next.js renderer, and local API run together
milestones.evidence: README states npm run dev starts the Next.js renderer and Electron desktop shell; API binds to 127.0.0.1:4777 or nearby fallback.

projects.name: AthleteOS
projects.role: Central athlete intelligence platform and ecosystem hub for dashboards, alerts, long-term timelines, and cross-system orchestration.

sourceDocs.usedFor: Project purpose and ecosystem role

sourceDocs.title: Task LIst 11-26-25.docx

milestones.title: Define AthleteOS as central ecosystem hub
milestones.evidence: Document states AthleteOS is the centralized athlete intelligence platform and ecosystem container.
milestones.nextAction: Use this role to decide cross-project reporting and integration priority.
milestones.notes: Purpose definition is complete; implementation remains tracked separately.

milestones.title: Stabilize server and resolve critical runtime blockers
milestones.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit re-verified exit 0 on 2026-07-06 (this tracker update); AthleteOS TODO.md records the 50->0 error fix on 2026-06-17 (Supabase client conversions + jwt typing).
milestones.notes: Reclassified from needs_confirmation to todo: conflicting-source ambiguity resolved by direct verification.

milestones.title: Establish real identity, AuthProvider, login, route guards, and role source of truth
milestones.evidence: Phase 1 starts with AuthProvider, login page, route guards, replacing hardcoded demo-user-123, and replacing localStorage role toggle.
milestones.nextAction: Inspect current auth implementation and define exact acceptance criteria for Phase 1.

milestones.title: Choose one data architecture boundary
milestones.evidence: Document requires choosing direct Supabase frontend access or backend API for all data, and says not to continue hybrid after the decision.
milestones.nextAction: Make and record the boundary decision before building more end-to-end features.
milestones.notes: Default in the source document is Option A unless told otherwise.

milestones.title: Build first end-to-end backend/frontend feature
milestones.evidence: Source gives two options: notifications or file uploads.
milestones.nextAction: Pick notifications or file uploads, then use it to validate token flow, CORS, errors, and service boundaries.

milestones.title: Build core coach workflow
milestones.evidence: Phase 4 includes team management, athlete profiles, performance pages, coach dashboard, and role separation.
milestones.nextAction: Break Phase 4 into acceptance-tested milestones after auth and data boundary are settled.

milestones.title: Integrate TritonWear data into progression, readiness, and reports
milestones.evidence: Phase 5 requires fixing import pipeline, display in progression tab, and generating reports correctly.
milestones.nextAction: Verify current import pipeline and map TritonWear records to dashboard/report surfaces.

milestones.title: Integrate FormLab video processing pipeline
milestones.evidence: Source says video processing is not needed for launch but needed long-term.
milestones.nextAction: Start only after core workflow and FormLab API integration are stable.
milestones.notes: Deferred by product sequence.

milestones.title: Security, testing, DevOps, monitoring, and backup hardening
milestones.evidence: Phase 9 includes RLS, JWT enforcement, rate limiting, CORS, validation, tests, Docker, CI/CD, monitoring, and backups.
milestones.nextAction: Track hardening items after MVP functionality is stabilized, but address credential rotation immediately if still relevant.
milestones.notes: The audit references exposed credentials; this tracker does not store the values.

milestones.title: Add machine-client authentication for app-to-hub sync calls
milestones.evidence: Built server/src/middleware/serviceAuth.ts (x-service-key, salted SHA-256 against service_clients) + ops tool src/database/createServiceClient.ts. Typechecks clean in isolation (0 errors in new files).
milestones.nextAction: Verify end-to-end after the hub is online (see project-progress/NEEDS_YOUR_HANDS.md Phase 1), then mark done.
milestones.notes: Depends on aos-real-authentication.

milestones.title: Issue canonical athlete UUIDs and serve the athlete link registry
milestones.evidence: Built services/registryService.ts (resolveOrCreate by link/externalStableKey/mint; getRecord) + routes/registry.ts (POST /api/registry/athletes, GET /api/registry/athletes/:id). sourceApp taken from the service key, never the body.
milestones.nextAction: Verify end-to-end after the hub is online (see project-progress/NEEDS_YOUR_HANDS.md Phase 1), then mark done.

milestones.title: Implement sync inbox: POST /api/sync/push with idempotency, conflict detection, and envelope persistence
milestones.evidence: Built services/syncService.push (validate via vendored contracts, dedupe by idempotencyKey with conflict detection, store envelope, project to typed tables) + routes/sync.ts POST /api/sync/push (batch, per-app authorization). Migration supabase/migrations/0002_sync_and_registry.sql adds sync_envelopes + projection tables (idempotent).
milestones.nextAction: Verify end-to-end after the hub is online (see project-progress/NEEDS_YOUR_HANDS.md Phase 1), then mark done.

milestones.title: Implement GET /api/sync/pull consumer relay so spoke apps can consume each other's published envelopes
milestones.evidence: Built syncService.pull (cursor-paged, excludes consumer's own envelopes, optional type filter) + routes/sync.ts GET /api/sync/pull. Cursor is sync_envelopes.cursor_seq (bigint identity).
milestones.nextAction: Verify end-to-end after the hub is online (see project-progress/NEEDS_YOUR_HANDS.md Phase 1), then mark done.

milestones.title: Replace mock tritonwear/biomechanics/readiness routes with real queries over ingested data
milestones.evidence: Projection-backed intelligence route added 2026-07-11: GET /api/ecosystem/athletes/:id/summary (readiness history + precedence resolution + red flags + alerts) over readiness_snapshots/movement_red_flags. The legacy mock tritonwear/biomechanics routes still exist for the demo UI and are unchanged.
milestones.nextAction: Point the AthleteOS frontend at the ecosystem summary endpoint and retire/flag the mock routes.
milestones.notes: Depends on aos-sync-ingestion-api and live feeds.

milestones.title: Emit AthleteOSCore required events to SentiOS
milestones.nextAction: Wire SentiClient into server startup, sync ingestion, and module status paths.

milestones.title: Session-link registry endpoints (SharedSessionLink)
milestones.evidence: Migration 0003_session_links.sql (unique per source app+session+type); RegistryService.linkSession (idempotent, revision-bumping, hub mints sharedObjectId when omitted) + getSessionLinks; POST/GET /api/registry/sessions behind service auth. Server tsc --noEmit clean.
milestones.nextAction: E4: optional athlete+time-window matching when sharedObjectId is omitted (needs additive sessionTimestamp on the request).

milestones.title: Hub intelligence: readiness-source precedence resolution + first alert rule (CNS overreach)
milestones.evidence: services/intelligenceService.ts: pure resolveReadinessSource (fresh spoke within 48h authoritative, hub engine otherwise, provenance on every answer) + pure evaluateCnsOverreachAlert (suppressed neuro + recent warning/critical red flags; critical on global red + 2 flags; Olbrecht load-spike condition documented as extension slot C). scripts/test-intelligence.ts 9/9 fixture tests; server tsc clean. Committed 2a88fd3.
milestones.nextAction: Condition C (Olbrecht anaerobic load spike) once SessionResponse/DerivedMetrics envelopes flow; ?view=panel projection for the Control Center (F5).

projects.role: Biomechanics and technical execution system for swim and lift analysis using force, motion, video, and physics-oriented movement data.

milestones.title: FormLab Engine and FormLab App exist as separate components
milestones.evidence: Audit states FormLab-Engine is a sophisticated Python backend and FormLab-App is a React/TypeScript/Vite wizard backed by Supabase and a mock physics engine.
milestones.nextAction: Confirm active code paths and run baseline app checks.
milestones.notes: Source-explicit but undated.

milestones.title: Complete foundation fixes: requirements, env safety, FastAPI import, braking force bug, package name
milestones.evidence: Verified 2026-07-07: requirements.txt present; FastAPI fallback stub removed (direct import in api.py); package.json name = "formlab"; .env gitignored with .env.example present; braking-force chart bug moot (mock physics removed, App calls real /simulate). Git-history scrub of the previously committed .env remains a user-side task.
milestones.notes: Package name was observed as formlab in package.json, but this milestone remains todo until all Phase 1 items are verified.

milestones.title: Connect App to Engine with a real API contract
milestones.evidence: End-to-end verified 2026-07-07 via TestClient: /health 200 (equations_v9), /simulate 200 with physically-sane outputs (89.6 N drag @1.82 m/s freestyle; sex-specific exponents), 400 on invalid input; App types extended (DragDecomposition) and App typecheck+build clean. /analysis/run stays 501 by design (Phase 1 foundation scope).
milestones.notes: Audit-era blocker was stale: a minimal compatible contract now exists; the full analysis contract is still missing.

milestones.title: Align App and Engine schemas and choose one data store strategy
milestones.evidence: Audit states App submits a simple Athlete type while the Engine requires registered athlete, mechanical profile, session capture, video assets, tags, and optional trajectory samples; App uses Supabase while Engine uses SQLite. Code inspection 2026-06-12: /simulate works without shared persistence, but the stores remain disconnected for the full analysis pipeline.
milestones.blocker: App and Engine currently use incompatible schemas and disconnected persistence.
milestones.nextAction: Choose Engine SQLite read endpoints or Supabase serialization as the single integration path.

milestones.title: Surface joint angles, torques, confidence, legality notes, recommendations, and race sections in UI
milestones.evidence: Audit lists several outputs the Engine computes or types that the App does not display.
milestones.nextAction: Implement after the API contract and schema alignment are stable.

milestones.title: Add authentication, athlete profiles, scoped history, pagination, and filtering
milestones.evidence: Audit lists auth, profile page, logged-in user scoping, pagination, and filters.
milestones.nextAction: Define ownership model and Supabase/Auth boundary after data-store decision.

milestones.title: Clean up Engine internals and migration strategy
milestones.evidence: Audit calls out service.py size, repetitive persistence, fragile migrations, missing POST /analysis/run implementation, and CORS wildcard.
milestones.nextAction: Refactor after minimum viable App/Engine integration is proven.

milestones.title: Add deployment, CI, export/share, and video tagging workflow
milestones.evidence: Audit lists Docker, docker-compose, CI, video asset/tagging workflow, export/share, and error boundaries.
milestones.nextAction: Start after endpoint, schema, and basic output display are working.
milestones.notes: Deferred behind integration blockers.

milestones.title: Define and emit MovementRedFlag/BiomechReport envelopes with a recovery-cost estimate
milestones.evidence: MovementRedFlagUpsert/BiomechReportUpsert defined in the contracts package (payloads/biomech.ts + JSON Schema + Python bindings) with per-system recoveryCostEstimate, severity, and confidence — the exact fields the plan specified with Swim State.
milestones.notes: This is the docs' FormLab→Swim State recovery-cost flow.

milestones.title: Consume generated Python schema bindings in the Engine
milestones.evidence: Bindings vendored to FormLab-Engine/ecosystem_contracts/__init__.py (3-line vendor header; covered by check-vendored.mjs). Every outbound envelope is constructed and validated through the pydantic models (SyncEnvelope/MovementRedFlagUpsertPayload/BiomechReportUpsertPayload); tests round-trip pushed envelopes through SyncEnvelope.model_validate.

milestones.title: Push biomech reports and red flags to the AthleteOS sync API
milestones.evidence: formlab/ecosystem_sync.py: red-flag derivation from own scores/legality (documented threshold priors: <40 caution/<25 warning, severity-scaled per-system costs, confidence gate 0.30, deterministic uuid5 ids per analysis+code), SQLite outbox (migration 003), athlete-link resolution against the hub registry, batch push with x-service-key, senti athlete_os_export_success/fail, 5-min drain loop + post-analysis async drain. Wired into run_analysis completion (no-op unless ATHLETEOS_HUB_URL/SERVICE_KEY set). 11 tests; suite 88/88.

milestones.title: Emit FormLab required events to SentiOS
milestones.evidence: formlab/senti.py (module FormLab): env-configured (SENTIOS_URL/SENTIOS_API_KEY), fail-silent daemon-thread POST; formlab_heartbeat on app build, video_uploaded on asset registration, analysis_complete on pipeline completion. athlete_os_export_* will attach to the Phase 3 hub-push work. Engine suite 69/69 after wiring.

milestones.title: VPM-calibrated drag coefficient feedback + velocity-aware wave drag
milestones.evidence: equation_registry v10: drag_coefficient_from_active_drag (Cd = 2*D_active/(rho*v^2*A)) and wave_drag_velocity_scaled ((v/1.7)^2 surface ratio, clamped [0.2,1.5], spec-anchored at 50% at v=1.7 m/s). hydrodynamic_engine v8: quality-gated VPM trials now calibrate the athlete drag coefficient (drag_source="vpm_calibrated" with provenance), replacing the population default when the gate passes; wave drag now scales with velocity instead of a fixed 50% surface split. Persisted as new derived-metric rows (no migration needed). 8 new tests in test_ratified_upgrades.py + full suite 77/77.

milestones.title: Refactor App.tsx and expand strategy layer
milestones.evidence: Audit calls out App.tsx at 1,829 lines and thin strategy modules.
milestones.nextAction: Refactor by major tab and add event selection/season planning only after high-priority deployment/tests.
milestones.notes: Deferred behind high-priority production readiness work.

milestones.title: Adopt the shared contracts package and map ReadinessLog to the ReadinessSnapshot envelope
milestones.evidence: Contracts vendored to swim-state-pro-2/src/ecosystem-contracts; src/sync/readinessEnvelope.ts maps ReadinessLog -> ReadinessSnapshotUpsert with documented categoryBanding; 6 adapter unit tests pass (vitest); full suite 17/17; vite build clean.

milestones.title: Store canonical athlete UUID mapping alongside local athlete records
milestones.evidence: supabase/migrations/20260706000000 adds athlete_links (RLS per user); src/sync/athleteLinks.ts resolves via hub POST /api/registry/athletes and persists the mapping. Live resolution against a running hub still awaits NEEDS_YOUR_HANDS Phase 1 env steps.

milestones.title: Publish daily readiness snapshots and system flags to the hub via outbox push
milestones.evidence: sync_outbox table (idempotency keys, attempts, RLS) + src/sync/outbox.ts drain worker batching to POST /api/sync/push; enqueue wired into addReadinessLog/saveReadinessLog fire-and-forget; startEcosystemSync() in main.tsx; hub-off = silent no-op (standalone guarantee). Live push awaits hub bring-up.

milestones.title: Ingest FormLab movement-dysfunction payloads as recovery-cost inputs to the fatigue model
milestones.evidence: src/sync/movementCostMapping.ts (pure: recoveryCostEstimate x confidence -> state units, scale 1.0, cap 1.0/system — documented prior) + movementCostInbox.ts (cursor-paged hub pull filtered to movementRedFlagUpsert, sharedAthleteId -> local athlete via athlete_links, idempotent application via ingested_red_flags unique constraint, cost applied through applySessionFatigueCost so it decays like session load) + migration 20260709000000 (sync_pull_state, ingested_red_flags, RLS). Wired into the sync worker interval + connectivity events. 7 mapping tests; suite 45/45; build clean.
milestones.nextAction: Refinements logged as ECOSYSTEM_IMPROVEMENTS E1 (per-dysfunction cooldown), E2 (park unmatched envelopes), E5 (validate thresholds on real analyses).
milestones.notes: This is the docs' FormLab→Swim State flow.

milestones.title: Emit SwimState required events to SentiOS
milestones.evidence: src/sync/senti.ts fail-silent emitter; required events wired: session_imported (addTrainingSession), readiness_updated (both save paths), athlete_os_push_success/fail (outbox drain), swim_state_heartbeat (45s interval). No-op unless VITE_SENTIOS_API_KEY set.

milestones.title: Implement Module 5 recovery debt (D(t) accumulation, M_debt decay modifier, Module 7 composite penalty)
milestones.evidence: readiness-engine/src/recovery/debt.ts: accumulateRecoveryDebt (7-day half-life decay + alpha/beta stressor terms), debtDecayModifier (M_debt_s = 1 - d_s*D(t), documented informed-prior sensitivities), normalization helpers. Wired into fatigue/projection.ts + coupling/engine.ts (decay side, backward-compatible optional param) and readiness/scoring.ts (Module 7 debtPenalty=0.10 on the composite). Persisted via supabase/migrations/20260708000000_add_recovery_debt.sql + adapters/recoveryDebtPersistence.ts; advanced fire-and-forget from addReadinessLog/saveReadinessLog. 18 dedicated tests + full suite 38/38, build clean.
milestones.nextAction: Consider deriving twoADayEvidence from real session-count-per-day data (currently contributes 0 at the persistence-advancement call site, honestly documented) and shortSpacingEvidence from RecoveryOpportunity where available.
milestones.notes: d_s per-system sensitivities (neuro 0.35/muscular 0.25/cardio 0.15) are a first-pass informed prior per Module 8 philosophy, not a literature value — revisit once per-athlete nudging has data.

milestones.title: Connectivity-aware drains, historical backfill, engine version stamps (B1/B2/D6)
milestones.evidence: Sync worker drains on online/visibility events (jittered, 30s min gap) alongside the 5-min timer; backfill.ts enqueues full readiness history with log-UUID idempotency keys; outbound snapshots stamp READINESS_ENGINE_VERSION (ssp-readiness-engine/4.5.0-module5) in extensions. Suite 45/45, build clean.

milestones.title: Phase 3 inbox hardening: cooldown, parked envelopes, per-stream cursors (E1-E3)
milestones.evidence: 72h per-(athlete,dysfunction) application cooldown (audit rows still recorded at zero cost); parked_envelopes table + retry for red flags whose athlete is not yet linked (no longer dropped past the cursor); sync_pull_state keyed by (user_id, stream). Migration 20260710000000; suite 46/46; build clean. Committed d283bf4.

milestones.title: Finalize engineering lock specification
milestones.evidence: Document status is implementation locked and precedence rule says it governs until a newer engineering lock is issued.
milestones.nextAction: Use this document as implementation reference until a newer lock is issued.
milestones.notes: Specification completion is source-explicit but undated.

milestones.title: Finalize MVP feature list
milestones.evidence: Document is titled finalized MVP feature list and defines core modes, entry flows, TritonWear fields, mismatch detection, dashboards, and export flow.
milestones.nextAction: Map each MVP feature to implementation status in the active code path.
milestones.notes: Scope definition is done; implementation is tracked separately.

milestones.title: Implement deterministic session classification and probability distribution
milestones.evidence: Spec defines seven canonical classes, thresholds, priority order, triangular membership functions, softmax temperature, and calibration modes.
milestones.nextAction: Inspect active engine code and tests for achievedClassTop, achievedClassDistribution, classifierTemperature, and calibrationMode.
milestones.notes: Spec is locked, but implementation status has not yet been confirmed.

milestones.title: Implement mismatch model, readiness bands, warnings, and recommendation engine
milestones.evidence: Spec defines mismatch components, class-specific weights, weight reflow, system load allocation, readiness bands, warning triggers, and recommendations.
milestones.nextAction: Confirm engine implementation and test coverage for mismatch/readiness/recommendation outputs.

milestones.title: Implement Coach, Athlete, and Rehab Staff visibility and access rules
milestones.evidence: MVP requires Coach/Rehab view/edit all athlete data and athletes view/edit their own only; TritonWear data visible to coach and rehab only, never athletes.
milestones.nextAction: Verify current auth/role model and define enforcement points.

milestones.title: Implement manual athlete session entry and coach/rehab TritonWear entry with auto-linking
milestones.evidence: MVP defines session info, subjective scores, session type, TritonWear data sections, stroke toggles, autofill support, and auto-linking by athlete/date/time.
milestones.nextAction: Map MVP input fields to current UI and data schema, then fill gaps.

milestones.title: Implement daily review, mismatch trends, system strain summaries, and energy distribution dashboards
milestones.evidence: MVP requires mismatch flagging, override/approval, weekly review, summaries, trend visuals, strain summaries, and heatmaps.
milestones.nextAction: Confirm which dashboard pieces already exist, then break remaining work into UI and engine milestones.

milestones.title: Support structured export/download, external AI analysis upload, and coach notification
milestones.evidence: MVP requests rehab staff export/download, external AI upload, athlete file attachment, and in-app notification to coach.
milestones.nextAction: Define export format and upload/notification workflow.

milestones.title: Sync cleanly with Swim State Pro through shared athlete identity, session timing, readiness exchange, and derived output schemas
milestones.evidence: Engineering lock states shared athlete identity, shared session timing, shared readiness exchange, and shared derived output schemas are mandatory.
milestones.nextAction: Execute via the Phase 2 milestones in INTEGRATION_PLAN.md: oet-donate-sync-domain, oet-implement-sync-adapter, oet-consume-readiness-modulation, oet-publish-session-envelopes.
milestones.notes: Superseded in detail by INTEGRATION_PLAN.md (2026-06-12) Phase 2; kept as the umbrella milestone.

milestones.title: Record first frontend, engine, build, and server verification baseline
milestones.evidence: Project defines frontend typecheck, test:engine, build, and server typecheck commands.
milestones.nextAction: Run verification commands and store results in check-in history.

milestones.title: Generalize the Olbrecht sync domain (envelopes, payload types, SourceApp) into the shared contracts package
milestones.evidence: Contracts vendored to app/project/src/ecosystem-contracts; domain/enums.ts re-exports shared enums (single enum identity, SourceApp now 7 apps); domain/sync.ts re-exports envelope/payload/identity types; readiness payload schema updated to shared-package merge shape; npm run typecheck clean.

milestones.title: Implement the SwimStateProSyncAdapter against hub push/pull
milestones.evidence: src/adapters/hub-sync.adapter.ts implements SwimStateProSyncAdapter against hub push/pull (x-service-key, cursor-paged pullSince, identity-conflict guard on linkAthlete); src/adapters/sync-outbox.ts with pluggable storage, idempotency-stable retries, max-attempt fail-out; 5 harness tests pass. linkSession held locally pending a hub session-link endpoint (ECOSYSTEM_IMPROVEMENTS A3).
milestones.notes: Directly advances oet-swim-state-sync.

milestones.title: Consume Swim State Pro readiness snapshots to modulate session targets per the engineering lock
milestones.evidence: src/engine/modulation/readiness-modulation.ts modulates session targets from ecosystem ReadinessSnapshotUpsert categories: global banding (green maintain / yellow tighten / orange reduce / red class-swap), dominant-system gating via LOCK_SPEC_CONFIG load allocations, anaerobic-power 6d/4d spacing rule, taper precedence (<=21d caps volume, preserves intensity); 11 tests pass; engine suite 27/27.

milestones.title: Publish SessionPlan, SessionResponse, and DerivedMetrics envelopes to the hub
milestones.evidence: src/adapters/envelope-factory.ts stamps SessionPlan/SessionResponse/DerivedMetrics envelopes (source app + schema versions + idempotency); outbox ready to carry them; envelope test passes.
milestones.nextAction: Wire createSessionPlan/Response/DerivedMetrics envelope enqueue into the session save flows once the sessions feature UI lands.

milestones.title: Emit OlbrechtEngine required events to SentiOS
milestones.evidence: src/adapters/senti.adapter.ts (module OlbrechtEngine): fail-silent emit, reportPushOutcome mapping drain results to athlete_os_export_success/fail, 45s olbrecht_engine_heartbeat.

milestones.title: Real hub linkSession + DOM-free connectivity drain triggers
milestones.evidence: HubSyncAdapter.linkSession posts to /api/registry/sessions and adopts the hub sharedObjectId (local cache kept as offline fallback); SyncOutbox.attachDrainTriggers wires injected online/visibility hosts with jitter + rate limit. Typecheck clean; 29/29 engine tests (2 new).

milestones.title: Ratify hub-and-spoke transport through AthleteOS with local outbox fallback
milestones.evidence: Owner ratified all four INTEGRATION_PLAN.md Section 6 decisions on 2026-06-12: hub-and-spoke transport; readiness precedence rule (revised from engine retirement); contracts seeded from existing Olbrecht/Swim State designs; Swim State-Olbrecht as the first live pair.
milestones.nextAction: None. Decisions recorded in INTEGRATION_PLAN.md Section 6.
milestones.notes: Readiness-ownership was revised at ratification: spoke authoritative for its sport, AthleteOS engine retained for uncovered athletes.

milestones.title: Create shared ecosystem contracts package (envelopes, payload schemas, identity links) as TypeScript + JSON Schema
milestones.evidence: Built at packages/ecosystem-contracts/. TS surface typechecks clean; JSON Schema mirror (schemas/envelope.schema.json, 23 defs) validates; dist emitted (CommonJS, extensionless imports for both Vite apps and Node servers); 9 package tests pass (node test/contracts.test.mjs). README + VERSIONING.md written.
milestones.nextAction: Consume from spoke apps starting in Phase 1/2.

milestones.title: Define canonical athlete identity issuance and per-app link mapping
milestones.evidence: src/identity.ts defines SharedAthleteLink, SharedSessionLink, CanonicalAthleteCreateRequest/Record; AthleteOS specified as UUID issuer (INTEGRATION_PLAN 3.3). Definition complete.
milestones.nextAction: Implement the registry endpoints in AthleteOS (Phase 1: aos-canonical-athlete-registry).

milestones.title: Document canonical data flow direction, order, and cadence for every exchange
milestones.evidence: src/flows.ts enumerates all 9 payload flows with producers, consumers, cadence, trigger, and flowOrder, following the docs' FormLab->SwimState->Olbrecht->AthleteOS direction. Compiles clean.
milestones.nextAction: Revisit only if a new payload type or flow is introduced.

milestones.title: Define schema versioning and compatibility policy for envelopes
milestones.evidence: VERSIONING.md written: additive-only minor policy, unknown-field/enum tolerance, major-bump dual-write migration, three-representation sync rule. Envelope carries syncSchemaVersion (1.0.0) + per-payload payloadSchemaVersion.
milestones.nextAction: Follow-up (noted in VERSIONING.md): automate python/ regen from schema in CI.

milestones.title: Generate Python bindings from JSON Schemas for the FormLab Engine
milestones.evidence: python/ecosystem_contracts Pydantic v2 bindings mirror the JSON Schema; smoke-tested with pydantic 2.12 (envelope round-trip, wire serialization, unknown-field tolerance all pass). Hand-authored-faithful; codegen automation tracked as a VERSIONING.md follow-up.
milestones.nextAction: Wire into the FormLab Engine in Phase 3 (fl-consume-python-bindings).
milestones.notes: Blocked-by-sequence on the JSON Schema mirror, which is part of finishing eco-contracts-package.

milestones.title: Ecosystem design-token package (color/type/spacing/radius/elevation/motion, dark-first)
milestones.source: Owner UX/visual mandate 2026-07-10 + Control Center ratification 2026-07-11
milestones.nextAction: Create packages/ecosystem-design-tokens (CSS variables + TS constants), vendored like the contracts; dark glass is the signature identity, light variant included.
milestones.notes: Prerequisite for the Control Center and the per-app visual upgrade passes.

milestones.title: Hub GET /api/ecosystem/status (apps, last envelope per flow, outbox depths, alerts)
milestones.nextAction: Aggregate service_clients + sync_envelopes + intelligence alerts into one panel-ready endpoint; add ?view=panel trimmed shape (improvement F5).

milestones.title: Per-flow connection settings contract (On/Pause/Off) + worker enforcement in every spoke
milestones.nextAction: Define the settings shape in the contracts package; add the check to each outbox/inbox worker (Pause keeps queuing, Off skips enqueue); mirror state to the hub for panel rendering.
milestones.notes: Toggles only ever reduce traffic - standalone rule intact.

milestones.title: Build @ecosystem/control-center (constellation, particle flows, pair->flow toggles, dark glass)
milestones.nextAction: After tokens + status endpoint: vendorable React panel, overlay + standalone modes, flows.ts-generated map, header icon with live status dot + Ctrl+E summon; then vendor into all six apps.
milestones.notes: Presets ("Race season") deferred to v2.
